rationale: Disk audit on 2026-05-21 found the NEW-MODULE backlog for reference-doc-backed courses is EXHAUSTED: every module of AP CS A (1-10), AP Psychology (1-16), AP Biology (1-11) and AP Calculus AB (1-12) already has a committed script.json. Idempotence forbids regenerating them. The remaining in-scope gap is the mandatory artifact-contract requirement that every module folder contain _review_A.json + _review_B.json + _review_C.json. AP Calc AB M1 + M3-M12 carry script.json but are MISSING those review files (only M2 has the full cascade on disk). AP Calc is the ONLY such course that also has a CED reference doc, which Reviewer C (anti-hallucination citation checker) strictly requires. So this run back-fills the 3-reviewer cascade for AP Calc, mirroring the sanctioned Slot A 2026-05-20T04:12Z retroactive cascade for AP Biology M4-M9.
broadcast_constraint: ALL 12 AP Calc modules already carry a youtube.video_id (verified). script.json is therefore broadcast-locked and MUST NOT be edited (would diverge on-disk text from the live video). This run ONLY adds _review_*.json audit files. Any Reviewer-C critical finding is escalated to _review_failed/<slug>/WHY.md with the broadcast constraint noted, for a human to choose re-record vs YouTube-description errata. No script.json is regenerated.

modules_planned.topics: Exam structure + FRQ strategy (no new calculus)

processing_order: lowest-numbered gap first (M1, M3, M4, ...), in concurrent waves; quality over quantity
resume_protocol: A module is DONE when its folder contains _review_A.json AND _review_B.json AND _review_C.json. Slot B / future runs: re-scan, skip any module already carrying all three, continue with the rest.
strategic_finding_for_human: The reference-doc-backed new-content backlog is exhausted. To generate genuinely NEW courses (AP Statistics, Geometry, Chemistry, US History, etc. — all have prisma course defs but NO teaching-videos folders), a human must add CED/reference docs under references/<slug>-ced.md, because the auto-pipeline is forbidden from fetching live web content. AP CS A (M1-M10) and AP Psychology (M1-M16) ALSO lack the review cascade but cannot be rigorously audited tonight because they have no reference doc for Reviewer C.
